text.headline: The Geographic Arc
text.text: An academic journey from Florida through Illinois to Stanford, spanning research excellence, innovation, and mentorship.

text.headline: Gainesville / University of Florida
text.text: Juan Santiago's undergraduate foundation in Mechanical Engineering at University of Florida.

text.headline: Urbana-Champaign / UIUC
text.text: Graduate formation (M.S., Ph.D.) and postdoctoral research at University of Illinois, establishing microfluidics expertise.

text.headline: Stanford / Faculty Career
text.text: Faculty appointment (1998-present), Stanford Microfluidics Laboratory founding, and distinguished professorship.
